summary: Assimilated Water.zip one-water contract into Cosmos and added the first bathymetry/depth raster plumbing for orbital ocean, sea-level water, underwater fog/caustics, and coastal foam.
implemented: Bathymetry overlay runtime with manifest/status callback and procedural fallback
RGBA depth atlas contract: depth01, shelf, coast, land
NOAA ETOPO WMS preview fetch script
Bathymetry-driven orbital planet ocean color and coast/land awareness
Bathymetry-driven projected ocean shallow optics, abyss tint, caustic bias, and coastal foam
Cosmos Review UI controls and Bathymetry data status panel
One-water physics helpers for dispersion, shallow-water speed, capillary-gravity response, and EBT top-K breaker selection
Unit tests for bathymetry overlay and one-water physics helpers
next_targets: Convert real NOAA ETOPO or GEBCO elevation data into RGBA depth01/shelf/coast/land atlas
Add bathymetry debug channel overlays for /cosmos-review
Add SF0/SF1 spawn-field debug MVP and EBT breaker overlay
Capture local Playwright screenshots and lead-eyes review notes
